---
title: ""
output: github_document
---

```{r eval=F, echo=F}
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
filp <- 'vignettes/General_algorithm.Rmd'
rmarkdown::render(filp)
```

```{r setup, echo=F}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
```

# Overview

![](main_sheet.jpg)

# Phase 1:

# Phase 2:

# Phase 3:

# Phase 4:
